penalties.description: Task completion notification appears before tail cutting phase is observed inside the trainer.

reasoning: Major disagreement on task completion. Claude observed completion notification in frame 19 with loops still visible and tails present, indicating incomplete execution. GPT-4o reported completion at 72 seconds with tail cutting observed. Given the automatic zero condition for incomplete tasks in the rubric, and Claude's specific frame-based evidence of premature completion notification, the incomplete task penalty applies.
